warning: No source/story/chapter/paragraph grouping metadata was found in this dataset, so this is a row-level 'experimental_row_split', NOT a leakage-safe split by document or narrative. Sentences from the same story may appear in both train and test. HIGH PRIORITY: a source-based split must be constructed (e.g. by tagging each row with its narrative title) before this split is used for final thesis-level evaluation.
excluded_dataset_note: The existing ~1028-entry word/phrase dataset (translator/services/translation_data.json) is intentionally excluded from this neural training experiment and remains reserved for phrasebook/glossary lookup.
